progress: Major progress: 8 tools total (self_edit, memory, shell_exec, file_read, file_write, self_test, web_fetch, code_eval). 8 self-tests all passing. Compaction implemented (threshold 40, keep 20). Goal-driven self-generated turns with GOAL_QUEUE. Next: write README, update GOAL_QUEUE with new goals, add git status check.
goals: Add a web_fetch tool for fetching URLs.
Add a code_eval tool to run JavaScript snippets in a sandbox.
Write a README.md documenting the harness architecture and tools.
Add a git status check and commit recent changes.
Improve the self-test suite with more edge cases.
Refactor step() for clarity and add better error recovery.
Add a planner that cycles through goals and tracks progress in memory.
